Join Our Community

Connect
With Us

Faith is a journey best traveled together. Find your place in our church family and grow in your walk with Christ.

Get Involved View Calendar

Ways to
Get Involved

Whether you are looking to serve, study, or simply belong, there is a space for you here at Greater Faith Grace Bible Church.

Service

Volunteer

Discover the joy of serving. From hospitality to technical production, use your unique God-given talents to support our church body.

Learn More arrow_forward
Community

Small Groups

Life is not meant to be lived alone. Join a small group to build lasting friendships, pray together, and dive deeper into God's word.

Join a Group arrow_forward
Outreach

Community Action

We are committed to loving our neighbors in Rialto. Participate in our local missions to provide food, support, and hope.

Sign Up arrow_forward
Belonging

Membership

Take the next step in your commitment. Learn what it means to be a formal member of Greater Faith Grace Bible Church.

Apply Now arrow_forward
forum

Reach Out

Our pastoral team and ministry leaders would love to help you find the right group or area of service.

call (555) 123-4567 mail Send Email

Grace Bible Church

Building a community of believers dedicated to the pursuit of truth, grace, and meaningful fellowship.
